posts.hook: kimi k3's grades came back a day late, and they're good but not the best
posts.caption: independent benchmarks finally land for moonshot's kimi k3, linus torvalds tells linux's ai critics to fork it or walk, paypal's board says no to a $53b buyout, and mlb bans genai in the dugout. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: kimi k3's independent benchmarks finally land
slides.desc: ==2.8t== open model scores near opus 4.8, tops one arena outright

slides.title: claude code now runs a 5-agent review fleet
slides.desc: cloud agents check every internal pr, only high-confidence bugs get flagged

slides.title: linus torvalds to ai coding critics: fork it
slides.desc: backs an ai review tool that catches half of later-fixed kernel bugs

slides.title: germany's soofi s tops open-model benchmarks
slides.desc: 30b sovereign model beats rivals in both english and german

slides.title: paypal's board just said no to a buyout
slides.desc: stripe and advent's ==$53b== bid undervalues the company, sources say

slides.title: trump's teleprompter operator allegedly gamed kalshi
slides.desc: accused of betting on what trump would say before he said it

slides.title: mlb just banned ai in the dugout
slides.desc: a third of teams were using genai iPads for in-game strategy calls

posts.hook: china's president just called unequal ai access a 'historical injustice'
posts.caption: xi jinping casts china as open-source ai's champion at the world ai conference, meta and anthropic talk a $10b compute deal, google's gemini 3.5 pro slips behind schedule, and apple sends legal letters to dozens of ex-staff now at openai. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: xi jinping pitches china as open-source ai's global champion
slides.desc: warns unequal ai access risks 'historical injustices', hours after kimi k3's mixed grades

slides.title: meta in talks to rent anthropic ~$10b in ai compute
slides.desc: the clearest sign yet meta wants to sell excess compute, not just use it

slides.title: google's gemini 3.5 pro slips months behind schedule
slides.desc: a coding-focused retrain missed its own bar, alphabet shares dipped on the news

slides.title: microsoft's ceo publicly knocks anthropic's fable
slides.desc: nadella says its refusals on 'random things' make no sense for a $5b investment

slides.title: apple sends legal letters to ~40 ex-staff now at openai
slides.desc: trade-secrets fight escalates from openai itself to individual former employees

slides.title: san francisco orders apple and google to pull 13 ai apps
slides.desc: the apps generate deepfake nude images, google says it already removed five

slides.title: tsmc adds $100b more to its arizona chip buildout
slides.desc: total us commitment now $265b, funded by a quarter with 77% profit growth
